questions: What is the severity of the inflammation (mild, moderate, severe)?
Is the uveitis bilateral and severe? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have any known allergies? (Yes/No)
Is the patient taking any medications that could interact with steroids or immunosuppressives? (Yes/No)
Is the patient responding to maximal topical and repository steroids? (Yes/No)
Has an exact etiology been determined? (Yes/No)
If yes, what is the specific etiology?
Is the anterior chamber reaction improving? (Yes/No)
